overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury futuristic penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a time-lapse transition from day to night and back to day. The camera moves from a balcony overlooking Night City through a spacious modern living room with holographic displays, along a glass-walled corridor, and ends at a pool table area with an outdoor patio view.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse balcony with panoramic city views

events.description: time-lapse transition from day to night, neon signs illuminate on surrounding buildings
rain begins to fall during the night sequence, visible as streaks in the light

agents.ego_description: walking out onto the balcony terrace overlooking the futuristic cityscape of Night City

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and towers of Night City visible in the distance
tall palm trees on the balcony terrace
stone seating area with integrated planters on the balcony
tall industrial communication tower with multiple antenna arrays

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a luxury balcony with views of Night City. A dramatic time-lapse transitions the scene from bright daylight to rainy night, with neon holographic billboards illuminating on nearby buildings. The balcony features stone benches and palm trees under a covered roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern living room with floor-to-ceiling windows and minimalist furniture

events.description: time-lapse transitions back to day, bright sunlight streams through the floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious living room past contemporary furniture and a glowing holographic display tower

entered.detail: tall blue glowing holographic screen displaying data and advertisements
large red carpet defining the central seating area
circular glass coffee table with metal frame

segments.scene_description: Moving indoors into a sleek living room with wooden floors and a prominent red area rug. A tall holographic display tower glows blue on the right side. The time-lapse reverses, bringing back daylight that floods the space through massive windows overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with glass walls overlooking the outdoor terrace

events.description: approaching the entertainment area with pool table visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the glass-walled corridor with views of the outdoor terrace and city beyond

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass wall overlooking the outdoor terrace
red-felt pool table with cues and balls arranged for play
decorative curved wooden room divider with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a long corridor with glass walls on the left revealing the outdoor terrace and palm trees. Sunlight streams in, casting shadows on the wooden floor. A pool table becomes visible ahead, positioned near a decorative wooden partition on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: entertainment area with pool table and outdoor patio access

events.description: slowing to observe the pool table and outdoor bar area, then turning toward the patio

agents.ego_description: exploring the pool table area and looking toward the outdoor patio with bar seating and lounge furniture

entered.detail: outdoor kitchen and bar area with counter stools
red spherical paper lanterns hanging above the patio area
outdoor lounge seating and dining furniture on the terrace

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the entertainment area featuring a red-felt pool table. The camera moves past the wooden partition, revealing an outdoor bar counter with red hanging lanterns and patio furniture. The space transitions from indoor to semi-outdoor, with views of the terrace and distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-rise balcony through a luxury penthouse as the environment cycles through a dramatic day-to-night time-lapse. It begins outdoors among stone benches and palm trees, where bright daylight rapidly shifts into a rainy night illuminated by glowing neon holographic billboards. As the camera moves indoors across wooden floors and a red area rug, the time-lapse reverses, bringing a flood of morning sunlight back into the living room and across a blue holographic display tower. The scene then flows along a glass-walled corridor where streaming light casts shadows on the floor before turning toward a red-felt pool table and a decorative wooden partition. Finally, the movement carries the viewer past the entertainment area to an outdoor bar counter with red hanging lanterns, merging the interior space with the open terrace and the distant city skyline.
